mapper.insert: INSERT INTO WS_OFFLINE_MESSAGE ( ID, SENDER_ACCOUNT, RECEIVER_ACCOUNT, CONTENT, MES_TYPE, IS_SENT, CONTENT_TYPE, CREATE_TIME ) VALUES ( #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{senderAccount,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{receiverAccount,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{content,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{mesType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{isSent,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{contentType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} )
mapper.select: SELECT ID, SENDER_ACCOUNT, RECEIVER_ACCOUNT, CONTENT, MES_TYPE, IS_SENT, CONTENT_TYPE, CREATE_TIME FROM WS_OFFLINE_MESSAGE WHERE RECEIVER_ACCOUNT = #{receiverAccount,jdbcType=BIGINT} AND IS_SENT = '0'
select USER_ACCOUNT from sys_user where DEPT_ID = #{deptId} and POST_CODE = #{postCode}
